title: ARG
body:
Are you sure you're the only one in this world? The constant feeling that someone is there... Are you not alone?

# Welcome to the Minecraft ARG build.

We present a unique collection of mods that will take you into the exciting worlds of popular ARG projects right in the game! 

What awaits you:
• Atmospheric locations from famous ARG stories
• Unique items and blocks from the creators of the original
• New creatures and bosses
• Exciting gameplay

The build contains worlds of projects such as:
- null
- herobrine
- error
- Lucas
- and one more thing.

 Each mod in the build is carefully selected and integrated to give you an unforgettable experience exploring mysterious stories right in Minecraft. All textures are provided by the official creators of the projects, which guarantees their authenticity and quality.  

The build is aimed at immersing you in the old versions of minecraft and feeling the fear of these versions.
There are less than 100 mods in the build, so you obviously won't lag. I also advise you to play with the resource pack for old textures, it will add more atmosphere.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

There are screamers, loud noises, various entities in the build, you are not alone. I strongly recommend that you be careful, and remember: if you see an error, never look at them directly.

The assembly can also:
- The assembly can recognize your IP address
- The assembly can find your location
- May ask you to turn on the camera
- Create files on the desktop
- Change the wallpaper
- The window.Shake
-  error.null has been deleted
-  error.java.exepations has been fixed.

</details>


## !Attention! 
Assembly can break your worlds! I AM NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR THIS.
To prevent an eternal ban in your world, write the command /tbs_config
If the ban still occurred, then delete the entities folder in your world.
to remove the effects of vsh, write the command /tbs_config
The build contains horror elements and may not be recommended for players under 13 years of age.
